title: lithocarpus minahassae
intro: Lithocarpus minahassae, also known as the Minahassa Bur oak or the Minahassa Lithocarpus, is a species of tree belonging to the beech and oak family (Fagaceae). The leaves of the Lithocarpus minahassae plant have been traditionally used in Southeast Asian herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of the plant are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves are often brewed into a tea or made into a decoction to harness its medicinal properties and treat various ailments.
